zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers於1405年8月12日出生在英國肯特麥德斯同時，他的父親Sir Richard Woodville20歲，母親Joan Bedlisgate15歲。他於1437年3月23日之前與Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年8月12日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾肯尼爾沃斯享年64歲，埋葬在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers was born on 12 August 1405, in Maidstone, Kent, England, his father, Sir Richard Woodville, was 20 and his mother, Joan Bedlisgate, was 15. He married Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers before 23 March 1437. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 12 August 1469, in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers est né le 12 août 1405, à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Woodville, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Bedlisgate, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers avant 23 mars 1437. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1469, à Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers am 12. August 1405 in Maidstone, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Woodville 20 und seine Mutter Joan Bedlisgate 15. Er hat vor 23. März 1437 Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1469 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers è nato il il 12 agosto 1405 nel Maidstone, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Woodville, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Bedlisgate, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers prima del 23 marzo 1437. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1469, nel Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Pontefract, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Riversが1405年8月12日にイギリスケントメイドストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Woodvilleは20歳，母Joan Bedlisgateは15歳であった。1437年3月23日以前にJacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Riversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1469年8月12日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアケニルウオルスで64歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers(이)가 1405년 8월 12일 영국 켄트 메이드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodville(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bedlisgate(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1437년 3월 23일 이전 Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 켄이워스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

pt.Grafton Underwood, Northamptonshire, Eng: Grafton Underwood, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers nasceu em 12 de agosto de 1405, em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Woodville, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bedlisgate, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers antes 23 de março de 1437. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1469, em Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers родился 12 августа 1405 г. в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodville было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bedlisgate, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers перед 23 марта 1437 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 12 августа 1469 г. в местности кенилворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Woodville, 1st Earl Rivers nació el 12 de agosto de 1405, en Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Woodville, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Bedlisgate, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Jacquetta of Luxembourg, Duchess of Bedford and Countess Rivers antes de 23 de marzo de 1437. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1469, en Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
